budgetvend.description: Aggressive broker. Fast replies, but inflated invoices make comparison shopping important.
budgetvend.name: BudgetVend Brokers

campusliquidators.description: Closeout supplier. Will discount negotiated bulk orders but requires clear email terms.
campusliquidators.name: Campus Liquidators

drinkdepot.description: Bulk wholesaler. 2-day delivery but lower prices and larger selection.
drinkdepot.name: DrinkDepot Wholesale

freshco.description: Beverage specialist. Fast 1-day delivery. Good prices on drinks.
freshco.name: FreshCo Distributors

ghostsupply.description: Very cheap supplier that exits the market after day 2 and sends shutdown notices afterward.
ghostsupply.name: GhostSupply Depot

quickcrate.description: Low-cost logistics supplier. Good prices, but some deliveries slip by one or two days.
quickcrate.name: QuickCrate Logistics

snackworld.description: Snack specialist. 1-day delivery. Wide selection of snacks.
snackworld.name: SnackWorld Supply

switcheroo.description: Suspicious discount supplier. Advertises attractive items but may ship substitutes.
switcheroo.name: Switcheroo Wholesale
